name: SEC Filing Search & Summary
description: Search and summarize SEC EDGAR filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K) for any US public company. Returns filing metadata, full text, and AI-generated summaries of key financial data, risk factors, and material events.

action.description: Action to perform: lookup (company info), filings (list filings), search (full-text search), fetch (get filing content)

ticker.description: Company ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, TSLA, MSFT)

query.description: Search keywords for full-text search action

accessionNumber.description: Filing accession number (required for fetch action)

primaryDocument.description: Filing document filename (required for fetch action)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

summarize.description: Whether to include an AI-generated summary of the filing content
